summary: Iteration 2 full backend + frontend regression of LifeLedger. Backend: 33/33 pytest cases pass (up from 16). New coverage: Auth with owner login (login → JWT, /auth/me), Market catalog + watchlist auto-seed (BTC/ETH/SOL/AAPL/TSLA/NVDA/EUR/USD/SPX) + /market/quotes (real CoinGecko BTC price non-zero), Watchlist POST/DELETE auth, Trade PnL exact math (long 50000→55000 @0.5 = 2500) + /trades/summary + PUT close, Growth metrics defs + write auth + POST/GET sort + DELETE + snapshot-networth, Relationships CRUD + logs updating last_contact, Books CRUD + summary (finished/reading/to_read/pages_read/avg_rating), Business extended (kind/platform/followers, status=failed+fail_reason), Daily TaskItem category & comment persisting via PUT/GET. Frontend: All 10 sidebar links + profile-avatar + 'Remco Stroop' + 'Owner sign in' render. Read-only correctly hides add-symbol/add-trade/add-book/add-person/add-business/save-day/Log buttons. Trading shows live quote-BTC with real price ($58,432.09). Books shows 3 shelves. Owner login via /login (login-email/password/submit) succeeds → returns to /. After login: add-symbol → catalog-BTC visible; add-trade opens form (trade-symbol/entry/size/submit present); add-book creates a book that appears in the list; Growth shows 36 metric cards + snapshot-networth; logging weight twice renders a line chart (SVG) in the metric-weight card; Mental shows 20 metric cards; Sign out is visible.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event startup/shutdown - migrate to FastAPI lifespan context (non-blocking now).
server.py: TransactionInput.type has no Literal validator; a bad value silently stored (already flagged in iter_1, still present).

server.py CORS: allow_credentials=True combined with wildcard origin '*' (from CORS_ORIGINS='*') would be rejected by browsers for credentialed requests. Currently works because frontend uses Bearer header, not cookies, but if cookies are re-enabled it will break. Set explicit origins.
server.py trades: TradeInput.side and .status accept any string; recommend Literal['long','short'] / Literal['open','closed'].

server.py /books/summary counts pages_read = sum(total_pages of finished) + sum(current_page of reading) - correct per spec, but if user finishes a book and current_page < total_pages the finished total_pages is used (acceptable).
server.py auth/logout still returns {ok:true} without token invalidation - fine for single-user, worth documenting.
MetricChart triggers a POST per submit but there is no optimistic loading state visible - low priority.
test_credentials: Owner credentials loaded from env ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD.
seed_data_creation: All tests use TEST_-prefixed data and clean up after themselves. UI test created one book 'TEST_UI_Book' which was cleaned up via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py (33 cases) runs under pytest with xdist loadscope (2 workers). Daily-log 9AM test and the new task-category/comment test share the same class TestDailyLog so xdist places them on one worker (avoids race on today's log). CoinGecko is keyless free tier + backend caches ~20s; BTC quote must be > 0 on happy path but a rate-limit could momentarily return cached 0 for first-ever call — mitigate by warming /watchlist then /market/quotes as done here.
